title: Tax offset questions T3-T11
description: How to complete the tax offset questions T3 to T11 in your paper supplementary tax return.

child_links.title: T7 - Super contributions on behalf of your spouse 2011
child_links.description: Complete question T7 if you made contributions to a complying superannuation fund or RSA on behalf of your spouse.

child_links.title: T8 - Zone or overseas forces 2011
child_links.description: Complete question T8 if you want to claim a zone or overseas forces tax offset.

child_links.title: T9 - 20% tax offset on net medical expenses over the threshold amount 2011
child_links.description: Complete question T9 if you want to claim a tax offset for net medical expenses over the threshold amount.

child_links.title: T10 - Parent, spouse's parent or invalid relative 2011
child_links.description: Complete question T10 if you maintained a person who was 16 years or older and received particular government payments.

child_links.title: T11 - Landcare and water facility 2011
child_links.description: Complete question T11 if you have an unused 'landcare and water facility' tax offset from a pervious year.

child_links.title: T12 - Net income from working - supplementary section 2011
child_links.description: Provides information to help us work out your mature age worker tax offset entitlement.

child_links.title: T13 - Entrepreneurs tax offset 2011
child_links.description: Provides information to help you determine your entitlement to an entrepreneurs tax offset.

child_links.title: T14 - Other tax offsets 2011
child_links.description: Complete question T14 to claim other tax offsets.

child_links.title: Total supplement tax offsets 2011
child_links.description: Complete the total supplement tax offsets section in your supplementary tax return.
